description: In Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, analyze a combined dataset for a Salmonella outbreak investigation by linking 'CaseRegistry.csv' and 'LabResults.csv' (located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SalmonellaOutbreak\) using the common 'CaseID' column. Perform frequency analyses for 'LabResult' and 'AgeGroup', and cross-tabulations of 'ExposedToChicken', 'ExposedToEggs', and 'Sex' by 'LabResult'. Ensure all 55 records are included in the analysis and export the output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SalmonellaOutbreak_Output.html.
